message:
fix: prompt auto-submit, identity files, identity reuse, model guard, recovery flag, restart liveness

Fixes #64, #66, #68, #69:

- #66: Pass correct agent type to sendPromptWithDoubleEnterForAgent instead
  of defaulting to AgentUnknown, fixing prompt auto-submit for Claude/Codex/Gemini
- #68: Write per-pane identity files to /tmp/agent-mail-name.<hash>.<pane_id>
  after successful CreateAgentIdentity so notify hooks can resolve AGENT_MAIL_AGENT
- #69: Load existing SessionAgentRegistry on respawn and reuse identities
  instead of always creating new ones, preserving message thread continuity
- #64 WP-A: Fail fast with actionable error when model override is specified
  but agent command has no template syntax (would silently drop the model)
- #64 WP-B: Add --no-recovery flag to suppress session recovery injection
  independently of --no-cass-context
- #64 WP-C: Add post-restart process liveness check via pane_pid query,
  reporting process_alive in robot response (backward compatible, additive)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
